hooks.command:
bash -c '
PIDFILE=/tmp/claude-rl-tensorboard.pid
LOGFILE=/tmp/claude-rl-tensorboard.log
if [ -f "$PIDFILE" ] && kill -0 "$(cat "$PIDFILE")" 2>/dev/null; then
  exit 0
fi
cd /home/saps/projects/rl
setsid nohup scripts/tensorboard_gcs.sh > "$LOGFILE" 2>&1 < /dev/null &
echo $! > "$PIDFILE"
' 2>/dev/null || true
bash -c 'cd /home/saps/projects/rl && git fetch --quiet && git pull --ff-only --quiet' 2>&1 || true

bash -c '
PIDFILE=/tmp/claude-rl-tensorboard.pid
if [ -f "$PIDFILE" ]; then
  PID=$(cat "$PIDFILE")
  kill -TERM "-$PID" 2>/dev/null
  rm -f "$PIDFILE"
fi
' 2>/dev/null || true
